stemHtml: Can the pilot change from IFR to VFR, during an IFR flight in VMC in controlled airspace?

options.a: Yes. ATS shall be notified, and the pilot will use the specific expression "CANCELLING MY IFR FLIGHT".
options.b: No. IFR flights in VMC are prohibited and the pilot shall fly in VFR.
options.c: No. IFR flights in VMC must remain under IFR and CANNOT change to VFR.
options.d: Yes. Nevertheless, the pilot must be invited by ATS to change from IFR to VFR. The ATS will use the specific expression "SUGGESTING TO CANCEL IFR".
